7. ~~(american(yuri) & professional(yuri)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. american(yuri) & professional(yuri) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0] : (can_jump_shot(X0) | ~professional(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
10. ! [X0] : (leap_straight(X0) | ~can_jump_shot(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
11. ! [X0] : (activate_leg_muscles(X0) | ~leap_straight(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
16. ~professional(X0) | can_jump_shot(X0) [cnf transformation 9]

18. ~leap_straight(X0) | activate_leg_muscles(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
19. ~activate_leg_muscles(yuri) [cnf transformation 5]
20. professional(yuri) [cnf transformation 8]
22. can_jump_shot(yuri) [resolution 16,20]
24. leap_straight(yuri) [resolution 17,22]
25. activate_leg_muscles(yuri) [resolution 18,24]
26. $false [forward subsumption resolution 25,19]
